basic_details.job_title: Central Bank of India Counselor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Central Bank of India (CBI) Counselor Notification 2026 has been released on 13 May 2026 on the official website of Central Bank of India. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CBI Counselor Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 45 to 65 years who have Graduate qualification in any discipline from a recognized university along with computer knowledge are eligible to apply for these Counselor vacancies.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 45 years Maximum Age: 65 years

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any discipline from recognized university
qualification.details: Graduate in any discipline from a recognized university. Must be computer literate with proficient knowledge of MS Office, internet, and typing in the local language. Excellent communication skill in the local language is essential. Retired/VRS opted Bank Officials of Scale I and above of Nationalized Banks including SBI and RRBs preferred OR Ex-Serviceman/other than Bank Employees having Banking knowledge and completed relevant IIBF certification course. Unblemished service record with at least 10 years of experience as an Officer/permanent employee. Must be a resident of Jalgaon District, Maharashtra.

salary_details.details: Rs. 25000/- per month + Rs. 1000/- per month for Conveyance including Mobile

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Central Bank of India Counselor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
